text: Here's what science actually says about caffeine and adenosine. Caffeine blocks adenosine, a neurotransmitter that makes you feel tired. But why is that important? When we drink coffee, it competes with adenosine. This boosts alertness, but what else happens? Research shows chronic caffeine use can lead to tolerance. You might need more to achieve the same effect! But here’s the catch—too much caffeine can disrupt sleep. Balance is key. Want more insights on caffeine? Like and follow for more science facts!
